title: exclude transient Work Item start evidence from release archive
rawUserRequest: 以后遇到 CI 或 PR 被挡住，先分析是否能从根本流程上改善；如果可以，先停下来改流程。此次发布前门禁发现 Work Item start receipt 进入 canonical archive，先修正归档边界，不启动或跳过任何计划内工单。

declaredIntent.summary: 将 transient Work Item start receipt 从 canonical release archive 中排除，使生命周期证据不会改变发布源归档摘要。

outOfScope: Any adopter or installed runtime repository
Starting or reordering planned Work Items

sources.reason: Defines the root-cause archive boundary correction.

riskAssessment.reason: One export-boundary rule changes canonical archive membership; no runtime code changes.

preReviewWarnings: Verify canonical archive digest changes only because of the intended boundary rule.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Work Item start receipts are excluded from the canonical release archive while archived immutable evidence remains preserved.
The release preflight reproduces a stable archive identity after merge, ai-close-work-item, and default-base synchronization.
The full Contract/Preflight/PR/merge/ai-close-work-item lifecycle passes without starting or reordering planned Work Items.
guidelines: Canonical release archive boundaries are explicit and reviewable.
Template evidence remains separate from adopter or installed runtime state.
Budget and formatting preflight must pass before PR.

intent.problem: The post-close release preflight still reports a source/archive mismatch because the Work Item start receipt is included in the canonical archive after closure.
constraints: Do not change release publication workflow logic or planned Work Item order.
intent.rationale: Lifecycle bookkeeping must not perturb the source archive that release metadata attests; the boundary belongs in repository export rules.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized root-cause process corrections when CI/PR/release gates expose workflow defects.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
